---
title: '`syncweaver init host`'
---

Initialize a host repository with syncweaver boilerplate: workflow templates,
lockfile stubs, and optional orchestrator registration.

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver init host --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

## Examples

```sh
# Initialize the current directory as a host repository
syncweaver init host

# Initialize and register with an orchestrator
syncweaver init host --orchestrator OWNER/syncweaver-orchestrator
```
